Selected Work

Projects.

Applied finance models, dashboards, and process simulations with real-world methodology.

P2P / R2R · FMCG
P2P / R2R Integrated Financial Model with DCF Valuation
Simulated full P2P cycle: PO creation, 3-way invoice matching (PO-GR-Invoice), AP aging, duplicate payment detection. Built integrated R2R model with 3-statement linkage, GL-to-sub-ledger reconciliation, accruals, depreciation waterfall, and DCF valuation with WACC sensitivity.
3Statements
SOXControls
WACCDCF Method
O2C · Shared Services
O2C Cash Application & SLA Dashboard
Built O2C dashboard simulating Shared Services AR: cash application status, AR aging buckets (0-30/31-60/61-90/90+ days), collection efficiency, dispute resolution TAT, deduction management, and bad debt reserve calculations. Designed ServiceNow-style SLA tracker with case aging and escalation triggers.
4Aging Buckets
SLATracker
Power BITool

Intercompany Reconciliation Model
Built mock intercompany reconciliation model across 5 legal entities and 200+ transactions, resolving 15 mismatched entries and cutting reconciliation time by 30% using Power Query, VLOOKUP, and SQL joins.
